title: MS: Read the Base Peak m/z
bodyText: Enter the $m/z$ value of the base peak.

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this would show the tallest signal clearly labeled against the m/z axis.

feedbacks: Correct: the base peak is at m/z 43.
Too low. The tallest signal is just above m/z 42.
Too high. The tallest signal is at m/z 43.
